{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Technical Design Officer",
  "description": "Proforce Industries Limited was incorporated in 2008 as a total defence solution provider specializing in armoured vehicles and personal protection. The company&rsquo;s focus is on the delivery of confidence in protective mobility. We have developed a vibrant market for security and mobile protective products within Nigeria and Africa. PROFORCE has exploited its deep technical know-how to produce outstanding armored products for Government Agencies, Corporate Bodies, Diplomatic Communities and Private individuals within Nigeria and Africa.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Technical Design Officer

Job Location: No 1 Akaka Road, Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time
Department: Engineering / Research &amp; Development (R&amp;D)
Industry: Automobile Manufacturing

Job Summary


	We are seeking a talented, innovative, and detail-oriented Technical Design Officer to join our automobile manufacturing team in Abuja.
	The successful candidate will support the design, development, and improvement of automotive products and components, ensuring compliance with engineering standards, quality requirements, and manufacturing specifications.


Key Responsibilities


	Prepare and update engineering drawings, technical specifications, and design documentation.
	Develop 2D and 3D models of vehicle components and assemblies using CAD software.
	Assist in the design, development, and modification of automotive products and systems.
	Conduct engineering calculations, feasibility studies, and design analyses.
	Support prototype development, testing, validation, and product improvement initiatives.
	Collaborate with Production, Quality Assurance, Procurement, and Engineering teams to ensure design feasibility and manufacturability.
	Review designs and recommend improvements to enhance performance, reliability, safety, and cost-effectiveness.
	Maintain accurate records of design revisions and technical documentation.
	Ensure compliance with automotive industry standards, regulations, and company policies.
	Participate in product development meetings and provide technical support where required.
	Stay updated on emerging technologies, engineering trends, and industry best practices.


Qualifications and Requirements


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree or HND in Mechanical Engineering, Automotive Engineering, Mechatronics Engineering, Industrial Design, or a related field.
	2&ndash;4 years of experience in technical design, product development, or engineering design within a manufacturing environment.
	Proficiency in CAD software such as AutoCAD, SolidWorks, CATIA, Creo, or similar design applications.
	Good understanding of engineering drawing standards and manufacturing processes.
	Strong analytical, problem-solving, and technical skills.
	Excellent attention to detail and organizational abilities.
	Good communication and teamwork skills.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office applications.
	Membership of a relevant professional engineering body is an added advantage.


What We Offer


	Competitive salary and benefits package.
	Professional development and training opportunities.
	Exposure to innovative automotive technologies and projects.
	A collaborative and growth-oriented work environment.
	Career advancement opportunities.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should submit their updated CV, Cover Letter, Copies of Relevant Educational and Professional Certificates to: hr@proforcedefence.com and copy hrm@proforcedefence.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.",

  "validThrough": "2026-07-11",

  },

Technical Design Officer Job at Proforce Industries Limited




        
    

        
        Proforce Industries Limited was incorporated in 2008 as a total defence solution provider specializing in armoured vehicles and personal protection. The company’s focus is on the delivery of confidence in protective mobility. We have developed a vibrant market for security and mobile protective products within Nigeria and Africa. PROFORCE has exploited its deep technical know-how to produce outstanding armored products for Government Agencies, Corporate Bodies, Diplomatic Communities and Private individuals within Nigeria and Africa.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Technical Design Officer
     

            
    



Job Location: No 1 Akaka Road, Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time
Department: Engineering / Research & Development (R&D)
Industry: Automobile Manufacturing

Job Summary


	We are seeking a talented, innovative, and detail-oriented Technical Design Officer to join our automobile manufacturing team in Abuja.
	The successful candidate will support the design, development, and improvement of automotive products and components, ensuring compliance with engineering standards, quality requirements, and manufacturing specifications.


Key Responsibilities


	Prepare and update engineering drawings, technical specifications, and design documentation.
	Develop 2D and 3D models of vehicle components and assemblies using CAD software.
	Assist in the design, development, and modification of automotive products and systems.
	Conduct engineering calculations, feasibility studies, and design analyses.
	Support prototype development, testing, validation, and product improvement initiatives.
	Collaborate with Production, Quality Assurance, Procurement, and Engineering teams to ensure design feasibility and manufacturability.
	Review designs and recommend improvements to enhance performance, reliability, safety, and cost-effectiveness.
	Maintain accurate records of design revisions and technical documentation.
	Ensure compliance with automotive industry standards, regulations, and company policies.
	Participate in product development meetings and provide technical support where required.
	Stay updated on emerging technologies, engineering trends, and industry best practices.


Qualifications and Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree or HND in Mechanical Engineering, Automotive Engineering, Mechatronics Engineering, Industrial Design, or a related field.
	2–4 years of experience in technical design, product development, or engineering design within a manufacturing environment.
	Proficiency in CAD software such as AutoCAD, SolidWorks, CATIA, Creo, or similar design applications.
	Good understanding of engineering drawing standards and manufacturing processes.
	Strong analytical, problem-solving, and technical skills.
	Excellent attention to detail and organizational abilities.
	Good communication and teamwork skills.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office applications.
	Membership of a relevant professional engineering body is an added advantage.


What We Offer


	Competitive salary and benefits package.
	Professional development and training opportunities.
	Exposure to innovative automotive technologies and projects.
	A collaborative and growth-oriented work environment.
	Career advancement opportunities.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should submit their updated CV, Cover Letter, Copies of Relevant Educational and Professional Certificates to: [email protected] and copy [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "title": "Front Desk Executive (Gym)",
  "description": "EE Wellness Hub is a modern fitness center located in a serene environment at Alakija, Lagos State. At EE Wellness Hub, we are committed to promoting health, fitness, and overall well-being through state-of-the-art facilities, expert guidance, and exceptional customer service.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Front Desk Executive (Gym)

Job Location: Alakija, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are a newly established fitness centre in Satellite Town, Lagos, seeking a Front Desk Executiveto be the first point of contact for our members and visitors.
	The ideal candidate will be friendly, well-organized, and passionate about delivering excellent customer service in a fast-paced environment.


Key Responsibilities


	Welcome and attend to clients/members in a courteous and professional manner.
	Handle inquiries (in-person, phone calls, emails, and social media messages).
	Manage membership registration, renewals, and payments.
	Maintain accurate records of attendance, memberships, and daily transactions.
	Assist in scheduling fitness sessions and classes.
	Provide administrative support to the gym management team.
	Ensure the reception and waiting areas are clean, organized, and welcoming.


Requirements


	Minimum of OND / HND / B.Sc qualification; Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree is an added advantage.
	Previous experience in customer service, front desk, or receptionist roles is preferred.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, PowerPoint) and basic computer operations.
	Excellent communication, interpersonal, and organizational skills.
	Ability to multitask and remain calm under pressure.
	Friendly, approachable, and customer-oriented personality.
	Must reside around Alakija axis.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should submit their application to: careers.eewellnesshub@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Front Desk Executive (Gym) Job at EE Wellness Hub




        
    

        
        EE Wellness Hub is a modern fitness center located in a serene environment at Alakija, Lagos State. At EE Wellness Hub, we are committed to promoting health, fitness, and overall well-being through state-of-the-art facilities, expert guidance, and exceptional customer service.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Front Desk Executive (Gym)

Job Location: Alakija, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

            
    




	We are a newly established fitness centre in Satellite Town, Lagos, seeking a Front Desk Executiveto be the first point of contact for our members and visitors.
	The ideal candidate will be friendly, well-organized, and passionate about delivering excellent customer service in a fast-paced environment.


Key Responsibilities


	Welcome and attend to clients/members in a courteous and professional manner.
	Handle inquiries (in-person, phone calls, emails, and social media messages).
	Manage membership registration, renewals, and payments.
	Maintain accurate records of attendance, memberships, and daily transactions.
	Assist in scheduling fitness sessions and classes.
	Provide administrative support to the gym management team.
	Ensure the reception and waiting areas are clean, organized, and welcoming.


Requirements


	Minimum of OND / HND / B.Sc qualification; Bachelor’s Degree is an added advantage.
	Previous experience in customer service, front desk, or receptionist roles is preferred.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, PowerPoint) and basic computer operations.
	Excellent communication, interpersonal, and organizational skills.
	Ability to multitask and remain calm under pressure.
	Friendly, approachable, and customer-oriented personality.
	Must reside around Alakija axis.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should submit their application to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Finance Manager (FTZ)",
  "description": "T.O.N. Legal &amp; Corporate Services is a business management firm committed to helping our clients create sustainable businesses. Our team of experienced professionals provide effective strategies and quality services tailored to your needs. We are dedicated to helping you reach your business goals and ensure that your company is set up for success. Our approach is based on deep understanding of the local market and its regulations.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Finance Manager (FTZ)
Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full Time

Job Description


	We&rsquo;re seeking an experienced and strategic Finance Manager to lead and oversee the organization&rsquo;s financial planning, accounting, reporting, budgeting, treasury, compliance, and cost management functions.
	The ideal candidate will ensure financial stability, operational efficiency, regulatory compliance, and support business growth through accurate financial management and strategic decision-making.


Key Responsibilities


	Lead the preparation, implementation, and monitoring of annual budgets, forecasts, and long-term financial plans aligned with organizational objectives.
	Oversee the preparation and timely submission of monthly, quarterly, and annual financial statements, management reports, and performance analysis.
	Manage all accounting operations including general ledger, accounts payable, accounts receivable, fixed assets, inventory accounting, and cost accounting activities.
	Develop and implement effective cost control measures across departments and operational activities to improve profitability and efficiency.
	Monitor cash flow, working capital, and liquidity positions to ensure adequate funding for operational and strategic requirements.
	Provide detailed financial analysis and business insights to support management decision-making, investment evaluations, and strategic initiatives.
	Establish, maintain, and strengthen internal financial controls, policies, procedures, and governance frameworks to safeguard company assets and minimize financial risks.
	Coordinate and manage annual audits, statutory audits, tax audits, and regulatory inspections while ensuring timely resolution of audit findings.
	Ensure compliance with all applicable tax regulations, financial reporting standards, and statutory requirements including FIRS, state tax authorities, pension, NSITF, and other regulatory bodies.
	Oversee treasury management activities including banking relationships, cash management, foreign exchange transactions, and funding requirements.
	Review and approve financial transactions, payment schedules, reconciliations, and expenditure requests in accordance with company policies.
	Provide leadership, coaching, supervision, and performance management for finance and accounting team members.
	Collaborate with production, procurement, warehouse, sales, HR, and other departments to improve financial efficiency and operational performance.
	Develop financial models, investment appraisals, and business cases to support expansion projects, capital expenditure decisions, and new business initiatives.
	Monitor key financial performance indicators and recommend actions to improve profitability, operational efficiency, and financial sustainability.
	Ensure accurate maintenance of financial records, accounting documentation, and supporting schedules for management and regulatory purposes.
	Drive continuous improvement initiatives within finance processes through automation, system enhancements, and best practices.
	Adhere strictly to company policies while promoting financial accountability, transparency, and ethical business practices across the organization.


Requirements


	Minimum of B.Sc./HND in Accounting, Finance, Economics, or a related discipline.
	Minimum of 10 years progressive finance and accounting experience, with at least 5 years in a managerial or leadership role.
	Previous experience within a manufacturing environment.
	Strong knowledge of financial reporting standards, budgeting, treasury management, taxation, and cost accounting principles.
	Proven experience in managing audits, statutory compliance, and financial controls.
	Demonstrated experience in business performance analysis, profitability management, and strategic financial planning.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel, financial reporting tools, and ERP systems.
	Strong understanding of inventory management, production costing, and manufacturing finance operations.
	Experience working with cross-functional teams and senior management.
	Strong financial management and strategic planning skills.
	Budgeting, forecasting, and financial modeling expertise.
	Financial reporting and analysis skills.
	Cash flow and working capital management expertise.
	Internal controls and risk management knowledge.
	Tax planning and regulatory compliance knowledge.
	Strong business partnering and stakeholder management skills.
	Leadership and people management abilities.
	Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills.
	Strong attention to detail, financial accuracy, negotiation and relationship management skills.
	Excellent communication and presentation skills.
	Strong decision-making and commercial acumen.
	High level of integrity, accountability, and professionalism.


Preferred Certifications/Qualifications:


	ICAN, ACCA, CIMA, or equivalent professional certification.
	MBA or Master&rsquo;s Degree in Finance, Accounting, Business Administration, or a related field.
	Financial Modeling &amp; Valuation Certification (FMVA).
	Advanced Excel and ERP System Certification.
	Taxation and Financial Management Certifications.
	Membership of relevant professional bodies in finance and accounting.
",

Finance Manager (FTZ) Job at T.O.N. Legal & Corporate Services




        
    

        
        T.O.N. Legal & Corporate Services is a business management firm committed to helping our clients create sustainable businesses. Our team of experienced professionals provide effective strategies and quality services tailored to your needs. We are dedicated to helping you reach your business goals and ensure that your company is set up for success. Our approach is based on deep understanding of the local market and its regulations.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Finance Manager (FTZ)
Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full Time

Job Description
     

            
    




	We’re seeking an experienced and strategic Finance Manager to lead and oversee the organization’s financial planning, accounting, reporting, budgeting, treasury, compliance, and cost management functions.
	The ideal candidate will ensure financial stability, operational efficiency, regulatory compliance, and support business growth through accurate financial management and strategic decision-making.


Key Responsibilities


	Lead the preparation, implementation, and monitoring of annual budgets, forecasts, and long-term financial plans aligned with organizational objectives.
	Oversee the preparation and timely submission of monthly, quarterly, and annual financial statements, management reports, and performance analysis.
	Manage all accounting operations including general ledger, accounts payable, accounts receivable, fixed assets, inventory accounting, and cost accounting activities.
	Develop and implement effective cost control measures across departments and operational activities to improve profitability and efficiency.
	Monitor cash flow, working capital, and liquidity positions to ensure adequate funding for operational and strategic requirements.
	Provide detailed financial analysis and business insights to support management decision-making, investment evaluations, and strategic initiatives.
	Establish, maintain, and strengthen internal financial controls, policies, procedures, and governance frameworks to safeguard company assets and minimize financial risks.
	Coordinate and manage annual audits, statutory audits, tax audits, and regulatory inspections while ensuring timely resolution of audit findings.
	Ensure compliance with all applicable tax regulations, financial reporting standards, and statutory requirements including FIRS, state tax authorities, pension, NSITF, and other regulatory bodies.
	Oversee treasury management activities including banking relationships, cash management, foreign exchange transactions, and funding requirements.
	Review and approve financial transactions, payment schedules, reconciliations, and expenditure requests in accordance with company policies.
	Provide leadership, coaching, supervision, and performance management for finance and accounting team members.
	Collaborate with production, procurement, warehouse, sales, HR, and other departments to improve financial efficiency and operational performance.
	Develop financial models, investment appraisals, and business cases to support expansion projects, capital expenditure decisions, and new business initiatives.
	Monitor key financial performance indicators and recommend actions to improve profitability, operational efficiency, and financial sustainability.
	Ensure accurate maintenance of financial records, accounting documentation, and supporting schedules for management and regulatory purposes.
	Drive continuous improvement initiatives within finance processes through automation, system enhancements, and best practices.
	Adhere strictly to company policies while promoting financial accountability, transparency, and ethical business practices across the organization.


Requirements


	Minimum of B.Sc./HND in Accounting, Finance, Economics, or a related discipline.
	Minimum of 10 years progressive finance and accounting experience, with at least 5 years in a managerial or leadership role.
	Previous experience within a manufacturing environment.
	Strong knowledge of financial reporting standards, budgeting, treasury management, taxation, and cost accounting principles.
	Proven experience in managing audits, statutory compliance, and financial controls.
	Demonstrated experience in business performance analysis, profitability management, and strategic financial planning.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel, financial reporting tools, and ERP systems.
	Strong understanding of inventory management, production costing, and manufacturing finance operations.
	Experience working with cross-functional teams and senior management.
	Strong financial management and strategic planning skills.
	Budgeting, forecasting, and financial modeling expertise.
	Financial reporting and analysis skills.
	Cash flow and working capital management expertise.
	Internal controls and risk management knowledge.
	Tax planning and regulatory compliance knowledge.
	Strong business partnering and stakeholder management skills.
	Leadership and people management abilities.
	Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills.
	Strong attention to detail, financial accuracy, negotiation and relationship management skills.
	Excellent communication and presentation skills.
	Strong decision-making and commercial acumen.
	High level of integrity, accountability, and professionalism.


Preferred Certifications/Qualifications:


	ICAN, ACCA, CIMA, or equivalent professional certification.
	MBA or Master’s Degree in Finance, Accounting, Business Administration, or a related field.
	Financial Modeling & Valuation Certification (FMVA).
	Advanced Excel and ERP System Certification.
	Taxation and Financial Management Certifications.
	Membership of relevant professional bodies in finance and accounting.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Digital Marketing Manager",
  "description": "ICS Outsourcing is Nigeria&rsquo;s leading Outsourcing provider incorporated in August 1994. We offer a comprehensive range of outsourcing services ranging from People Outsourcing to Sales BPO. We provide bespoke Business Support Solutions to all kinds and sizes of business.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Digital Marketing Manager

Job Location: Lagos Mainland, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Agrochemical

Role Summary


	To build and lead the company&rsquo;s digital presence from the ground up, driving brand awareness, lead generation, and revenue growth across Nigeria&rsquo;s agricultural ecosystem.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement a full-scale digital marketing strategy aligned with business goals
	Manage website, social media platforms, and online brand positioning
	Plan and execute paid campaigns (Google Ads, Meta Ads, etc.)
	Drive lead generation campaigns targeting distributors, agro-dealers, and farmers
	Coordinate with branch teams for localized campaigns
	Develop seasonal campaigns aligned with planting cycles
	Oversee content strategy (product education, farmer awareness, promotions)
	Monitor analytics (traffic, conversions, ROI) and optimize campaigns
	Manage marketing budget and ensure cost efficiency
	Explore digital channels relevant to rural/agricultural markets.


KPIs


	Lead generation &amp; conversion rates
	Website and social growth
	Campaign ROI
	Brand visibility.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess an HND / Bachelor`s / Master`s Degree
	5+ years of digital marketing experience
	Strong expertise in SEO, SEM, social media, and analytics tools
	Experience in FMCG, agriculture, or distribution preferred
	Industry experience in agrochemicals, fertilizers, Agro commodities, or distribution is highly preferred.
",

Digital Marketing Manager Job at ICS Outsourcing




        
    

        
        ICS Outsourcing is Nigeria’s leading Outsourcing provider incorporated in August 1994. We offer a comprehensive range of outsourcing services ranging from People Outsourcing to Sales BPO. We provide bespoke Business Support Solutions to all kinds and sizes of business.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Digital Marketing Manager

Job Location: Lagos Mainland, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Agrochemical

Role Summary
     

            
    




	To build and lead the company’s digital presence from the ground up, driving brand awareness, lead generation, and revenue growth across Nigeria’s agricultural ecosystem.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement a full-scale digital marketing strategy aligned with business goals
	Manage website, social media platforms, and online brand positioning
	Plan and execute paid campaigns (Google Ads, Meta Ads, etc.)
	Drive lead generation campaigns targeting distributors, agro-dealers, and farmers
	Coordinate with branch teams for localized campaigns
	Develop seasonal campaigns aligned with planting cycles
	Oversee content strategy (product education, farmer awareness, promotions)
	Monitor analytics (traffic, conversions, ROI) and optimize campaigns
	Manage marketing budget and ensure cost efficiency
	Explore digital channels relevant to rural/agricultural markets.


KPIs


	Lead generation & conversion rates
	Website and social growth
	Campaign ROI
	Brand visibility.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess an HND / Bachelor`s / Master`s Degree
	5+ years of digital marketing experience
	Strong expertise in SEO, SEM, social media, and analytics tools
	Experience in FMCG, agriculture, or distribution preferred
	Industry experience in agrochemicals, fertilizers, Agro commodities, or distribution is highly preferred.
    

    

        Click here to Apply
